message:
feat(terminal): add terminal-widget feature with TerminalEmulator widget

Added a new terminal-widget feature that provides a composable terminal
emulator widget for embedding PTY sessions in FrankenTUI applications.

Changes:
- Added ftui-pty dependency (optional)
- Added terminal-widget feature combining terminal, ftui-render,
  ftui-widgets, and ftui-pty dependencies
- Added widget module to terminal/mod.rs with conditional compilation
- Added widget.rs implementing TerminalEmulator and TerminalEmulatorState

The terminal emulator widget integrates the ANSI parser, terminal state
machine, and PTY process management into a single widget that can be
embedded in any FrankenTUI layout. This enables building terminal
multiplexer-style applications or embedding shell sessions in demos.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
